freshness_slos.scope: Direct Go dependencies that carry the control-plane spine, embedded datastore, policy engine, plugin runtime, SQL driver, or RPC transport.
React, routing, Vite, Tailwind, TypeScript, Vitest, and browser-console runtime dependencies.
Linters, formatters, coverage tooling, type packages, and local developer support packages.
GitHub Actions, Docker bases, SBOM, SCA, image signing, and release packaging dependencies.

tracked_upgrades.name: github.com/fergusstrange/embedded-postgres
tracked_upgrades.rationale: Bundled eval PostgreSQL affects local integration tests and single-node eval startup; upgrades must refresh committed archive pins and Trivy receipts instead of moving only go.mod.

tracked_upgrades.name: github.com/nats-io/nats-server/v2
tracked_upgrades.rationale: Embedded JetStream is the AN-2 event source of truth; update work must run replay, projection, chaos, and outbox recovery tests together.

tracked_upgrades.name: github.com/open-policy-agent/opa
tracked_upgrades.rationale: OPA evaluates tenant policy in-process; upgrades must keep Rego behavior, policy property tests, and not-reachable advisory documentation aligned.

tracked_upgrades.name: github.com/tetratelabs/wazero
tracked_upgrades.rationale: WASM sandbox upgrades can change capability and host-call behavior; they need pluginhost conformance and sandbox regression tests.

tracked_upgrades.name: github.com/jackc/pgx/v5
tracked_upgrades.rationale: pgx sits under every RLS-enforced PostgreSQL path; upgrades must keep tenant context, migrations, and integration tests green.

tracked_upgrades.name: google.golang.org/grpc
tracked_upgrades.rationale: gRPC carries agent and signer RPC traffic; upgrades must keep UDS, mTLS, and signer process-boundary tests green.

tracked_upgrades.name: react
tracked_upgrades.rationale: React 19 needs a console compatibility pass across routing, auth context, accessibility tests, and the embedded Vite bundle; it is tracked as planned work rather than Dependabot churn.

tracked_upgrades.name: react-dom
tracked_upgrades.rationale: React DOM moves with React; the acceptance gate is the full console test, coverage, build, and embedded-bundle drift check.

tracked_upgrades.name: react-router-dom
tracked_upgrades.rationale: Router v7 changes navigation/data APIs; upgrade must preserve protected routes, login/logout flows, and console route coverage.

tracked_upgrades.name: vite
tracked_upgrades.rationale: Vite controls the committed embedded console bundle; major upgrades must preserve generated API types, bundle hashing, and Go embed tests.

tracked_upgrades.name: vitest
tracked_upgrades.rationale: Vitest major upgrades can change coverage and browser-like test behavior; move with @vitest/coverage-v8 and keep coverage floors stable.

tracked_upgrades.name: @vitest/coverage-v8
tracked_upgrades.rationale: Coverage provider must move with Vitest so shell and route coverage gates keep measuring the same code paths.

tracked_upgrades.name: tailwindcss
tracked_upgrades.rationale: Tailwind v4 changes CSS generation and plugin behavior; upgrade must preserve the shadcn-style console shell and visual regression gates.

tracked_upgrades.name: typescript
tracked_upgrades.rationale: TypeScript 6 should be upgraded with the generated OpenAPI types and strict build/typecheck gates, not as an isolated manifest bump.
